description: Standing Watch Insurance, Disabled veteran owned. My specialty is Medicare and VA health. I do all Medicare but know the VA system, how it works and doesn’t work with the VA. vets need to understand that they could be penalized for life if they do not sign up in time or get the right Medicare. Especially for TCFL and Champ VA. Also if their spouse turns 65 before the veteran what the spouse needs to continue to be covered by Champ VA and TCFL. You may also qualify for a Medicare give back as well. I hwlp with future life planning as well.
